hero.headline: Look like yourself, only better
hero.subheadline: Precise cuts, natural color, and styling that works with your life — not against it. Book online or walk in.

featured.name: Precision Cuts
featured.description: Tailored haircuts that work with your hair's natural texture and your daily routine.

featured.name: Balayage & Color
featured.description: Hand-painted highlights and full color services using low-damage, high-shine formulas.

featured.name: Blowouts & Styling
featured.description: Event-ready styling or a midweek refresh. Walk-ins welcome when available.

services.name: Women's Haircut
services.description: Consultation, shampoo, precision cut, and style.

services.name: Men's Haircut
services.description: Consultation, cut, and style. Includes hot towel finish.

services.name: Balayage
services.description: Hand-painted highlights for natural, sun-kissed dimension.

services.name: Single Process Color
services.description: Full head all-over color. Includes toner and gloss.

services.name: Deep Conditioning Treatment
services.description: Intensive moisture or protein treatment based on hair needs.

services.name: Bridal Styling
services.description: Trial session plus event-day styling. Includes touch-up kit.

services.name: Kids' Haircut
services.description: Ages 12 and under. Patient stylists, relaxed environment.

testimonials.name: Megan P.
testimonials.text: I've been going here for two years and my hair has never looked better. They actually listen to what you want.

testimonials.name: Rachel T.
testimonials.text: Best balayage in town. The color is always natural and grows out beautifully.

testimonials.name: David L.
testimonials.text: Clean shop, no fuss, great cut every time. In and out in 30 minutes.

team.name: Adriana Cole
team.title: Owner & Senior Stylist
team.bio: 12 years behind the chair. Adriana specializes in lived-in color and effortless cuts that grow out gracefully.

team.name: Jordan Blake
team.title: Colorist
team.bio: Trained at Bumble & Bumble in New York. Jordan's balayage work has a devoted following.

team.name: Sam Nguyen
team.title: Stylist
team.bio: Sam brings precision and calm to every appointment. Known for clean fades and textured crops.
